suggestions.title: Avoid binding auth scope at import time in _get_bearer_token
suggestions.recommendation: Resolve scope at runtime by using an optional parameter and falling back to TRAPI_AUTH_SCOPE inside the function.

suggestions.title: Add tests for retry exhaustion and non-retryable failure behavior
suggestions.recommendation: Add tests that verify failure after max retries on retryable statuses and no retry on non-retryable status codes.
